## Summary
Frontend software engineer with three years of experience building accessible, tested and responsive web products. Comfortable collaborating with designers and backend engineers to turn product requirements into maintainable TypeScript interfaces and reusable component systems.

## Experience
### Atlas Commerce - Frontend Software Engineer | 2023 - 2026
- Delivered React and TypeScript checkout and account journeys used across desktop and mobile, with reusable components and typed API integrations.
- Improved accessibility against WCAG guidance and added automated unit, integration and browser tests to prevent regressions.
- Partnered with product designers and backend engineers to scope releases, review analytics and resolve performance bottlenecks.

### Studio North - Web Development Intern | 2022 - 2023
- Built responsive interfaces from design-system specifications and documented reusable component patterns in Storybook.
- Audited page performance and accessibility, then implemented focused fixes across semantic HTML, CSS and client-side loading.

## Projects
### Accessible design system | TypeScript, React, Storybook, Vitest
- Built a reusable component library with keyboard interactions, visual states, documentation and automated accessibility checks.
- Added versioned release notes and visual regression coverage so product teams could adopt updates safely.

### Event booking web application | Next.js, TypeScript, Playwright, REST APIs
- Developed a responsive booking flow with server rendering, typed API clients, validation and end-to-end browser tests.
- Instrumented error states and performance budgets to improve reliability on mobile connections.

### Frontend performance lab | JavaScript, Web Vitals, Lighthouse, GitHub Actions
- Created reproducible performance scenarios covering bundle size, rendering and image loading across representative pages.
- Automated Lighthouse checks in CI and documented trade-offs between user experience and implementation complexity.
